zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Wood於大約1581年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯時，她的父親Richarde Woode33歲，母親Ellen Proude33歲。她於1602年5月6日與John Cooper在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯結婚。她去世於1635年在英國萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Wood于大约1581年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯时，她的父亲Richarde Woode33岁，母亲Ellen Proude33岁。她于1602年5月6日与John Cooper在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯结婚。她去世于1635年在英国萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Wood was born about 1581, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, her father, Richarde Woode, was 33 and her mother, Ellen Proude, was 33. She married John Cooper on 6 May 1602, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1635, in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Wood est née environ 1581, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Richarde Woode, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ellen Proude, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé John Cooper le 6 mai 1602, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1635, à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

Lei sposato John Cooper il 6 maggio 1602, nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1635, nel Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Wood(이)가 대략 1581년 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richarde Woode(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Proude(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1602년 5월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 John Cooper(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1635년 영국 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cooper 6 мая 1602 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1635 г. в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.
